title: portulaca pilosa var. eriophora
intro: Portulaca pilosa var. eriophora, also known as Dwarf Spurred Portulaca or Yellow Purslane, is a type of succulent plant that belongs to the Portulacaceae family. It has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant has been reported to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting the immune system. In traditional herbal medicine, Portulaca pilosa var. eriophora is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and can be used to treat various conditions, including digestive issues and skin problems.
